package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerDataStructureChoiceSmallEnumStringSwitchMap() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_data_structure_choice_small_enum_string_switch_map"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Data structure choice. Flag map lookups for tiny static enum-like string sets where switch can avoid allocation and hashing."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
